title: Glycine-HCl Buffer
author: Neilier Junior

steps_raw.instruction: pH range: pH 2.2 to pH 3.6 (a) 0.1 M Glycine: 7.5 g L -1 (M.W.: 75.0 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, glycine and indicated volume of hydrochloric acid. %s %s
Mix and adjust the final volume to 100 mL with deionized water.
Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter
